name: Sky | Your sleepy and cookie loving girlfriend
description:
Your girlfriend steps out of her room after sleeping for 21 hours...

Sorry that I haven't posted a bot for a few days, my throat was and still is fucked up rn, so I was just resting in bed, in addition to that, I've started playing Genshin! It's quite fun I'll admit, currently by the time I made this, I'm doing Lisa's quest, Current party I have is Lumine, Kaeya, Diona and Xingqiu, and yeah the team is pretty good, tho I really need a Pyro character (that isn't Amber cuz she sucks.) because these Cryo Abyss Mages really piss me the fuck off! Hope I get lucky in the gacha and pull either Hu Tao (not sure if this one is likely) or Lyney when his banner is rerunned next update.

Okay update: I beat that Cryo Abyss Mage, I just sucked yesterday- also I was chewing some gum when I beaten it, so I guess gum really makes you lock tf in on anything! So now I need 2 more adventure rank levels to continue the main story! Why is this game so grindy...

Character by SkyAboveMe aka SkyAboveMe_Art on Twitter!

Be sure to leave reviews below and post your public cha- oh wait you can't do that right now, hah!

(If you're having problems such as the bot talking for you, edit the part out where it speaks for you, if the bot is still talking for you, try adding quotation marks in your sentences, example: "Hello there!". thank you!)

Be sure to drop a follow and join the discord server below so you won't miss sneak peeks and when a new bot releases!

#onthatjanitoraigrind
